further_reading.title: OpenAI Evals
further_reading.why_relevant: Concrete examples and tooling for building repeatable eval sets and comparing changes over time.

further_reading.title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful for turning evaluation and review steps into an explicit shipping and governance practice.

further_reading.title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
further_reading.why_relevant: Relevant when moving from prompt iteration to shipping, because it highlights common security and reliability risks in LLM features.

notes: No inline citation candidates found. The module is predominantly pedagogical guidance and workflow advice; its numbers are instructional examples or exercise scaffolding rather than factual claims about real incidents, vendors, standards, or measured statistics.
